userActions.label: ECR Pull & Push
userActions.description: Grants permission to pull and push to AWS ECR repositories.

userActions.label: ECS Access Logs
userActions.description: Grants permission to access logs from AWS ECS tasks.

userActions.label: Aurora Serverless V2 Postgres Management
userActions.description: Provides operational access to Aurora Serverless v2 Postgres databases, including executing SQL statements via RDS Data API, reading database credentials, monitoring cluster health and performance metrics, viewing configuration and backup information, and accessing logs and recommendations. Enables day-to-day database management without infrastructure modification permissions.

userActions.label: Contributor Role
userActions.description: Grants Contributor Role on SMUS Instance

userActions.label: VertexAi User Role
userActions.description: Grants the user permissions associated with `roles/aiplatform.user` on the GCP project

userActions.label: VertexAi Admin Role
userActions.description: Grants the user permissions associated with `roles/aiplatform.admin` on the GCP project

userActions.label: Admin Role
userActions.description: Grants Admin Role on the SGPT Workspace

userActions.label: User Role
userActions.description: Grants Admin Role on the SGPT Workspace
